what_was_attempted: Describe the declared execution objective here.
what_actually_ran: Describe what really ran here, including any deviations.
failure_signals_triggered: Example failure signal triggered during execution.

trajectory_events.message: Describe the main execution step here.

non_conclusions: State what this result does not justify concluding.
decision_reason: Why the runtime should keep, revise, discard, or defer after ingesting this result.

followup_gap_writeback.title: Example cited-result gap
followup_gap_writeback.summary: The current execution result still depends on a cited source that was not locally reconstructed.
followup_gap_writeback.blocker_reason: The derivation stops at an external reference rather than a locally validated proof fragment.

suggested_queries.reason: Recover the missing cited derivation from Layer 0.

reopen_conditions: Ingest a cited source that closes the missing result.

next_actions: Optional next action written back into feedback/next_actions.md
